title: Post-interview questionnaire
instructions: A few quick questions about the conversation you just had. There are no right or wrong answers — please answer honestly.

likert_items.text: I felt comfortable during this conversation.
I felt the interviewer pushed its own opinions on me.
I would be willing to have a conversation like this again.
The topic we discussed is personally important to me.
I feel well-informed about this topic.

open_items.text: In a sentence or two, what is the most important thing you wanted to get across?
Is there anything you wish the interviewer had asked about?
